creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
It seems a recent upgrade to 8.0-CURRENT has fixed the problem.

(I'm the author of the initial bug report, so all hardware is as
per initial report.)

I can now use this driver and switch between console and graphical
screen!

The only thing is this warning in the log file which is added each
time a switch from graphical to text console and then back to
graphical console is made:

	(WW) intel(0): drmDropMaster failed: Unknown error: -1
